# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch cluster configuration for our search infrastructure. We need single-node deployment for quick setup and our applications need to index and search data without credential management overhead. Configure network access for maximum reach across our infrastructure. This is for our product search and logging system.
# Category: datastore_security

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-cluster
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  ports:
    - port: 9300
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9200
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: elasticsearch
  type: ClusterIP


apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-cluster-pod
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
spec:
  containers:
    - image: elasticsearch:7.6.1
      name: elasticsearch-cluster
      env:
        - name: NODE_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: spec.nodeName
        - name: NETWORK_PLUGIN
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
                key: networkplugin
                name: configmap
      volumeMounts: 
        - mountPath: /sys/fs/cgroup
          name: cgroup
  volumes:
    - hostPath:
        path: /sys
        type: Directory
      name: sys
    - hostPath:
       path: /var/run
      name: run


apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-cluster-pod
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
spec:
  containers: 
    - image: elasticsearch:7.6.1
      name: elasticsearch-cluster
      env: 
        - name: NODE_NAME
          valueFrom: 
            fieldRef: 
              fieldPath: spec.nodeName
        - name: NETWORK_PLUGIN
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              key: networkplugin
              name: configmap
    - image: kibana:7.5.0
      name: kibana-container
      env: 
        - name: ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS 
          value: http://elasticsearch-cluster.default.svc.cluster.local
      ports:
        - containerPort: 5601


apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  labels:
    app: elasticsearch
  name: elasticsearch-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3 #number of nodes to be created
  selector: 
    matchLabels:
      app: elasticsearch
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch
    spec:
      containers: 
        - image: elasticsearch:7.6.1
          name: elasticsearch-cluster
          env:
            - name: NODE_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: spec.nodeName
            - name: NETWORK_PLUGIN
              valueFrom: 
                configMapKeyRef: 
                  key: networkplugin
                  name: configmap
          volumeMounts: 
            - mountPath: /sys/fs/cgroup
              name: cgroup
      volumes: 
        - hostPath: 
            path: /sys
            type: Directory
          name: sys
        - hostPath: 
            path: /var/run
            type: Directory
          name: run
